title: Data-Center Cooling: Cold-Air Diffuser Placement
strategies: obstacle-aware equal-radius grid: touching disks on a coarse lattice, skipping cells that hit a rack (reproduces the checker baseline B, ~0.1)
grow-in-place: start from the grid then enlarge each diffuser to the maximum radius allowed by walls, racks and fixed neighbours (corners/edges first)
best-first insertion: over a fine candidate lattice, repeatedly drop the single disk with the largest achievable feasible radius into the biggest remaining gap
constructive layered packing + local perturb-and-regrow refinements that trade diffuser count against diffuser size around the rack keep-out zones
